title: How to create a board with horizontal due dates

posts.author: themightypm (MightyPM)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I would like to create a board with campaign names as columns and the due dates for each task as the values. See screenshot attached of an example.

Is there anyway I can do this? I would like to avoid having a status column for each date as that would get too cluttered.

Screenshot 2024-07-08 at 10.32.24 AM1940×808 96.2 KB

Thanks in advance!

  • S

posts.author: Bree (Bree)
posts.cookedHtml: Do the strikethroughs indicate a completed task?

posts.author: themightypm (MightyPM)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, strike through indicates a completed task

posts.author: Bree (Bree)
posts.cookedHtml: Could you use text columns rather than date columns. Then, indicate a completed task with a emoji? E.g., 30 May
